title: How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
summary: 本文介绍了数据科学团队如何利用ChatGPT Work从实际工作输入中构建根本原因简报、影响报告、KPI备忘录、范围分析和仪表板规范。
highlights: See how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.
